description_long: This is a military combat tactical vehicle resembling a main battle tank, featuring a long, prominent cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The vehicle is covered in a camouflage paint scheme with a mix of brown, tan, and green tones, designed to blend into natural environments. The hull and turret are heavily armored, with sloped surfaces and visible hatches, periscopes, and storage compartments. The sides display large, rugged tracks with multiple road wheels, suitable for traversing rough terrain. Additional equipment, such as cylindrical storage canisters, is mounted on the rear of the vehicle. No visible military markings or insignia are present on the exterior.
description: A heavily armored, camouflaged main battle tank with a long cannon, rotating turret, and rugged tracks. The exterior features sloped armor, storage canisters, and a multi-tone camouflage pattern.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the tank, including the long cannon, turret, and detailed track system with road wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the cannon barrel, sloped frontal armor, and the symmetrical arrangement of the upper hull and turret.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the turret, cannon, and rear-mounted cylindrical canister, with clear visibility of the track system.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the turret, storage canisters, and the rear armor of the hull.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret; possible secondary mounts on the turret but not clearly visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with sloped surfaces on the hull and turret; appears thick and robust, covering all critical areas.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Multi-tone camouflage with irregular patches of brown, tan, and green in a blended, organic style.
